prestazioni: M177/M178 (AMG 4.0L V8 Biturbo) engine: Full Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ package including billet crankshaft, forged pistons (Mahle 10.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and upgraded sodium-filled valves with titanium retainers. Pair with a Weistec W3 turbo upgrade (Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with 76mm compressor wheels, 1.22 A/R turbine housings, and ceramic ball bearings) for 850+ HP on 93 octane.

Drivetrain: AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT 9G transmission reinforced with a Wavetrac limited-slip differential (LSD) and upgraded clutch pack (Sachs Performance Stage 3 twin-disc clutch with cerametallic friction material). Install a Quaife ATB helical LSD for the front axle to eliminate torque steer under hard launches.

Suspension & Handling: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and high-speed compression) and remote reservoirs. Pair with H&R Monoball subframe bushings, SuperPro polyurethane control arm bushings, and a full set of Ohlins TTX46 adjustable dampers for the rear multi-link setup. Add a 25mm front sway bar (Hotchkis Sport Suspension) and a 22mm rear sway bar to reduce body roll.
estetica: Aero: Prior Design PD-GLE widebody kit with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and a ducktail spoiler (CFRP construction, 3.5kg weight savings). Install a custom Vorsteiner V-FF 107 carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust tips (Akrapović Evolution Line).

Wheels & Tires: Forged BBS FI-R 21x10.5 ET25 (front) and 21x12 ET40 (rear) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35 ZR21 front, 325/30 ZR21 rear). Add a set of HRE P107SC 22x12 ET45 wheels for track use with Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (335/25 ZR22).

Interior & Exterior: Full carbon fiber interior trim (Sabelt 6-point harnesses, Recaro Pole Position seats with Kevlar weave, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with Alcantara and carbon fiber). Exterior: Gintani carbon fiber hood with heat extractors, custom matte Selenite Grey Magno paint with PPF (XPEL Stealth), and a full de-chrome package (blacked-out badges, window trim, and grille).
